name: LayoutElementType
summary: Represents the type of the element. Possible values are section, category, group, create, action, query and none.

enum_values.name: action
enum_values.summary: Elements of this type result in library items that get clubbed under the Action cluster

enum_values.name: category
enum_values.summary: Category elements represent the root library items contained in section elements.

enum_values.name: classType
enum_values.summary: classType comes directly under its parent category, it contains just text without icon

enum_values.name: create
enum_values.summary: Elements of this type result in library items that get clubbed under the Create cluster

enum_values.name: group
enum_values.summary: Groups comes directly under its parent category, it contains just text without icon

enum_values.name: none
enum_values.summary: All other expandable library items that are not categories or groups

enum_values.name: query
enum_values.summary: Elements of this type result in library items that get clubbed under the Query cluster

enum_values.name: section
enum_values.summary: Section elements represent the root items on the library view
